sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n92129" key="r(aki/wsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥακίωσις</orth>, <sense id="n92129.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥάκωσις</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥακκίζω</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥαχίζω</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥακκόδυτος</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥακόδυτος</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ῥακλεός</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ῥάκελος</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
